title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Oic - Mayor Josephine H. Sumangil- Evangelista to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement on Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with the Giving Tree Located at Unit 2204 Bsa Twin Towers, Julia Vargas Corner Bank Drive Ortigas Center, Mandaluyong City Re: Construction and Operation of a Crematorium Facility in Los Baños and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, 09/15/2021)
